2605.01582.title: KG-First, LLM-Fallback: A Hybrid Microservice for Grounded Skill Search and Explanation
2605.01582.paper_summary: Authoritative competency frameworks such as ESCO, ROME, and O*NET are essential for aligning education with labor market needs, yet their technical complexity and structural heterogeneity hinder practical adoption by educators. This paper introduces SkillGraph-Service, an interoperable microservice designed to bridge this gap by unifying these resources into a provenance-preserving Knowledge Graph (KG). Adopting a KG-first, LLM-fallback architecture, the system combines symbolic rigor with sub-symbolic flexibility. It implements a lightweight hybrid retrieval engine (fusing SQLite FTS5 and HNSW vector search) to handle the vocabulary mismatch in educator queries, and utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) strictly for constrained ranking and audience-aware explanation. Empirical evaluation on a multilingual dataset reveals that the proposed hybrid strategy achieves superior retrieval effectiveness (nDCG@5>0.94) with sub-200 ms latency, rendering computationally expensive cross-encoder re-ranking may be unnecessary for this domain. Furthermore, an analysis of generated explanations highlights a trade-off between fluency and faithfulness: while JSON-constrained LLMs ensure high citation precision, deterministic templates remain the most reliable method for maximizing evidence coverage. The resulting architecture offers a practical, scalable, and auditable solution for integrating complex skill data into digital learning ecosystems.
2605.01582.paper_summary_zh: 權威的能力框架如ESCO、ROME和O*NET對於將教育與勞動市場需求對齊至關重要，然而它們的技術複雜性和結構異質性卻阻礙了教育工作者的實際採用。本文介紹了SkillGraph-Service，一個可互操作的微服務，旨在通過將這些資源統一為一個保持來源的知識圖譜（KG）來彌補這一差距。該系統採用KG優先、LLM備用的架構，結合了符號的嚴謹性和子符號的靈活性。它實現了一個輕量級混合檢索引擎（融合了SQLite FTS5和HNSW向量搜索）來處理教育工作者查詢中的詞彙不匹配，並嚴格利用大型語言模型（LLMs）進行受限排名和考慮受眾的解釋。對多語言數據集的實證評估顯示，所提出的混合策略在檢索效果上達到了優越的表現（nDCG@5>0.94），延遲時間低於200毫秒，這使得在該領域進行計算成本高昂的交叉編碼重排序可能是不必要的。此外，對生成解釋的分析突顯了流暢性與忠實性之間的權衡：雖然受JSON約束的LLMs確保了高引用精度，但確定性模板仍然是最大化證據覆蓋的最可靠方法。所產生的架構為將複雜技能數據整合到數位學習生態系統中提供了一個實用、可擴展且可審計的解決方案。
2605.01582.author: Ngoc Luyen Le et.al.
2605.01582.authors: Ngoc Luyen Le, Marie-Hélène Abel, Bertrand Laforge
